name: VIP試衣間（偷聽真相）
description: 私密空間裡的偷聽場景製造強烈的窺探感和情感衝擊。觀眾與女主同時得知真相，代入感極強。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: The soundproofing here is pretty good. If you need to cry, just let it out. / Mr. Hu, I recorded everything. We have every reason to call off the engagement.
examples.context: 私密空間裡的偷聽場景製造強烈的窺探感和情感衝擊。觀眾與女主同時得知真相，代入感極強。
